task_completion.description: Read the target coordinates from the provided text file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal displaying the contents of ~/Desktop/eo_targets.txt, showing coordinates for Washington DC, Beijing, and Moscow.

task_completion.description: Configure the spacecraft orbit and ground targets in GMAT.
task_completion.visual_evidence: GMAT GUI or a script editor showing a Spacecraft configured with a 500 km sun-synchronous orbit, and GroundStations or targets created for Washington DC, Beijing, and Moscow.

task_completion.description: Apply the calculated minimum elevation angle or corresponding field of view constraint.
task_completion.visual_evidence: GMAT GUI or script showing the minimum elevation angle set to approximately 57.37 degrees (between 56.0 and 58.5) for the ground stations, or a ConicalFOV sensor configured with a 60-degree full cone angle.

task_completion.description: Save the GMAT simulation script to the required directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: File manager, terminal, or GMAT GUI showing the script being saved as 'agile_targeting.script' in the ~/GMAT_output/ directory.

task_completion.description: Create the accessibility summary text file with the required pass counts.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal showing 'accessibility_summary.txt' in ~/GMAT_output/ containing the names Washington DC, Beijing, and Moscow, each with an associated number representing the total valid passes.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent actually ran the GMAT simulation to determine the pass counts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the GMAT run/animation window, a message window showing run completion, or terminal output indicating GMAT was executed, rather than the agent just guessing the numbers.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actively configured the mission rather than copying a pre-made solution.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the agent interacting with GMAT's GUI dialogs or typing out the script in an editor.

integrity.description: Verify the results in the summary file come from actual simulation outputs.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for GMAT output reports or ContactLocator text files being viewed by the agent to extract the pass counts before writing them to the summary file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target coordinates are located in /home/ga/Desktop/eo_targets.txt. The calculated minimum elevation angle should be approximately 57.37 degrees (acceptable range 56.0 to 58.5 degrees), or alternatively, a full-cone FOV of 60 degrees (acceptable range 59.9 to 60.1 degrees) should be used. The final script must be saved to /home/ga/GMAT_output/agile_targeting.script and the summary report to /home/ga/GMAT_output/accessibility_summary.txt.
